task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the axial view of the brain MRI to assess midline structures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface shows the 'Red' slice view (Axial) displaying brain ventricles and the septum pellucidum.

task_completion.description: Agent places a measurement ruler or markup line on the image to measure the shift.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible line or ruler markup drawn on the axial slice, connecting the ideal midline (center of skull/falx) to the displaced septum pellucidum.

task_completion.description: The numeric measurement value (in mm) is displayed on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A number representing distance (e.g., '4.2 mm' or similar) is visible next to the ruler or in the Markups control panel.

task_completion.description: Agent generates the clinical report JSON with required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal display showing the content of 'midline_shift_report.json' with keys: shift_mm, direction, severity, slice_location, clinical_recommendation.

task_completion.description: The reported severity and direction match the visual measurement and task thresholds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'severity' in the JSON matches the measured mm value based on task rules (e.g., 6mm = 'Severe'), and 'direction' matches the visual shift.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the measurement markup and the clinical report to the specified paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, save dialog, or terminal output confirming the creation of 'midline_measurement.mrk.json' and 'midline_shift_report.json'.

integrity.description: Agent used the application GUI tools for measurement rather than estimating or hallucinating.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer window is the active focus, and the Markups/Ruler tool is visibly active or has been used.

integrity.description: The reported measurement value corresponds to the visual ruler on screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The value in the JSON report is not significantly different from the ruler measurement shown in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the medical software to derive the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of loading data, navigating slices, and placing markups, rather than just opening a text editor to write the report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The septum pellucidum is the thin membrane between the lateral ventricles. Midline shift is measured as the perpendicular distance from the ideal midline (falx cerebri) to the displaced septum pellucidum. Verified clinical thresholds for severity are: Minimal (3-5 mm), Moderate (5-10 mm), Severe (>10 mm); however, the agent must follow the specific thresholds provided in the task description.
